name: nanocli
description: NanoCLI — Python CLI and Next.js dashboard for batch micro-transfers on Arc Testnet.

scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:cli
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=contracts && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=contracts && npm run lint --workspace=frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace=frontend
